# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Medication data update
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Calculation logic update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security or safety fix
- [ ] Other

## Medical / Calculation Impact

Does this change affect medication data, dose calculation, route handling, concentration, vial count, or remaining-volume logic?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, explain clearly.

## Source for Medical Data

List the source used for medication values, if applicable.

```text

```

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change.

- [ ] App starts successfully
- [ ] Search works
- [ ] Category filters work
- [ ] Medication detail screen opens
- [ ] Route-specific IV / IM values display correctly
- [ ] Dose and volume calculations were checked
- [ ] No safety warning was removed

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots if the UI changed.

## Safety Notes

Mention any safety or protocol-verification concerns.
